rationale: Strong match: environmental test chamber + integrated data-acquisition and control system aligns with Teclever's instrumentation & test-automation capability. Clear deliverables, installation + commissioning scope.

overview.title: Supply & Installation of Environmental Test Chamber

summary.markdown:
## Project Description
Supply, installation and commissioning of a walk-in environmental test chamber (-40°C to +150°C) with an integrated PC-based data-acquisition and control system.

## Technical Scope
- Chamber volume ≥ 8 m³, humidity 10–98% RH
- 32-channel data acquisition, SCADA HMI
- Calibration certificates traceable to NABL

## Hardware Requirements
- PLC + industrial PC, redundant sensors

## Eligibility / Restrictions
- **Restrictive:** OEM authorisation certificate mandated for the refrigeration unit
- Minimum 3 similar installations in the last 5 years

## Commercials
- EMD: ₹3,60,000 · PBG: 10% of order value
- Total estimated value: ₹1,80,00,000

## Submission
- Closing: 13 Jun 2026, 17:00 IST
